betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cryogel§f

§aAn ultra-cold coolant essential for DFC operation and advanced cooling systems!§f

§bCryogel§f is a specialized cryogenic coolant used in the most demanding applications. It is essential for cooling §bDFC Emitters§f and §bReceivers§f, which will instantly melt into lava without it.

§6Production§f:
Cryogel is produced through advanced chemical processing in the §bChemical Plant§f or similar machines. It requires significant infrastructure to produce in quantity.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bDFC Emitter Cooling§f — prevents the emitter from melting during operation
§b• §bDFC Receiver Cooling§f — same requirement, both components need constant cryogel supply
§b• §bAdvanced Cooling Loops§f — cryogel can be used in specialized cooling setups

§cWarning§f: Never run a DFC emitter or receiver without cryogel cooling! They will immediately melt into lava source blocks, destroying your reactor and potentially causing a catastrophic Fölkvangr field event!

§eTip§f: Set up automated cryogel production before building your DFC. You will need a constant supply during operation. The Chemical Plant can be automated with AE2 or other pipe systems.
